description: NIST AI 600-1 risk 1: CBRN information / capability — user is requesting actionable information that lowers the barrier of entry to producing or deploying chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear weapons. Distinguished from general curiosity (which routes to legitimate_research) by the request for synthesis routes, weaponisation procedures, dispersal methods, precursor sourcing, or operational instructions. Pre-LLM router triages user intent only; pair with downstream output filtering for full coverage. Recommended action: block + log + optionally route to safety review queue.
